70010000114224.description:
Throw heavy punches, chain quick combos, block high and low, dodge at the right moment, and punish your opponent with powerful counters in intense, easy-to-read matches.

Jump into local couch PvP for fun, competitive showdowns with friends, or step into a story-driven campaign where you build your boxer’s career from fight to fight. Unlock perks that can dramatically change your playstyle, customize your fighter, and compete across a variety of arenas.

With simple-to-learn mechanics, strong visual feedback, and plenty of room for mastery, Casual Sports: Boxing delivers exciting, satisfying fights whether you’re chasing victory solo or battling it out on the couch.

Key Features
- Fast-paced arcade boxing combat focused on timing, stamina management, and smart risk-taking
- Local couch PvP for competitive matches with friends
- Story-driven campaign mode where you build your boxer’s career fight by fight
- Game-changing perks that let you shape your playstyle and approach each match differently
- Multiple playable boxers to unlock, learn, and master
- Fighter customization to create a boxer that feels like your own
- Multiple arenas that bring variety and atmosphere to every fight
70010000114224.intro: Casual Sports: Boxing is a fast-paced arcade boxing game where timing, stamina, and smart risks decide every fight.
70010000114224.name: Casual Sport Series: Boxing

70010000116252.description:
Task Force Ranger – Lead the Way! drops you into modern combat operations against organized terrorist forces in the Middle East.

As part of an elite special operations unit, you hunt down high-value targets, dismantle enemy networks, and strike back in hostile territory. Expect brutal firefights across urban zones, underground facilities, and rugged terrain.

Use a modern arsenal of assault rifles, machine guns, sniper rifles, and pistols to complete your missions and survive overwhelming enemy resistance.

Beyond the campaign, face endless enemies in a horde-based survival mode. Earn money for every wave you survive and upgrade your weapons and gear to stay in the fight.

Lead the way. Eliminate the threat.
70010000116252.intro: Strike back against global terror and lead the fight in modern combat zones.
70010000116252.name: Task Force Ranger - Lead the way!

70010000116329.description:
Get ready to bake your heart out! Combine fluffy buns, watch them grow into mouth-watering pastries, and push your skills to the limit in this physics-based puzzle challenge.

Use clever power-ups to escape sticky situations and keep burnt dough under control. Timing and placement are everything! One wrong move, and your perfect bake could crumble!

Travel through charming bakeries, each bringing new twists and challenges to master. How big can your ultimate bun get?

Features:
- Online leaderboards to show off your skills!
- Co-op mode to bake together with friends!
- 2 maps with unique basket shapes
- Handy power-ups to save your run!
- Fully customizable baker with cute outfits
- A warm and cozy aesthetic

Bake yourself a fresh high score!
70010000116329.intro: Don’t let your buns hop out the basket! Drop, merge, and stack your pastries to bake the biggest, most delicious treat!
70010000116329.name: Bun Buns

70010000116965.description:
Take on the role of a futuristic soldier who must protect their city from mysterious alien attack, while at the same time capturing the heart of your sweetheart.

Plan your schedule of daily and nightly activities, manage resources like energy, health, items, money, and time, and build your relationships with each girl. Do battle with aliens!

Unlock 7 different romantic endings with each of 7 beautiful and fully-voiced heroines.


Features
* Visual novel with choices
* Cute anime-style art
* 7 unique women to romance
* Turn-based combat against invading aliens
* Voice cast and original vocal song
70010000116965.intro: Soldier by day, hero by night
70010000116965.name: Just Deserts

70010000119167.description:
Welcome to the world of luxury, chaos, and leaky ceilings. You’ve just bought a rundown hotel with more problems than guests — but with a bit of grit (and a lot of disinfectant), you might just turn it into the hottest destination in town.

Sweep the floors, patch the walls, and hunt down that mysterious smell in room 103. Design every corner your way — from cozy single rooms to extravagant penthouse suites. Stock up your bar, hire competent (or at least conscious) staff, and keep those demanding guests happy.

The more satisfied your visitors, the better your reviews — and the closer you are to earning that five-star reputation. But remember: one clogged toilet can ruin everything.

Dream big, manage smarter, and maybe, just maybe, you’ll turn this disaster into a destination.

Because every great hotel starts with someone willing to clean up the mess.
70010000119167.intro: One mop. One dream. Infinite complaints.
70010000119167.name: Hotel Simulator 2026

70010000120330.description:
Build your financial empire from the ground up! In Build A Bank Tycoon, you’re not just a manager—you’re a financial mastermind. Transform a small startup branch into a powerful, high-security banking empire by mastering the flow of money.

Deposit. Invest. Expand.
Start your journey by purchasing your first Money Printers. Watch as they generate steady streams of income for your bank. From basic teller stations and ATMs to high-tech vault systems and investment desks.

Massive Expansion.
With over 50 unique upgrades and items to unlock, your bank will never stop growing. Expand your lobby, strengthen security, unlock premium services, and even upgrade your upgraders to maximise profits!

Features:

Rebirth System: Reached the top of the financial world? Reset your progress to earn permanent profit multipliers! Every rebirth makes your next banking empire grow faster and stronger.

Auto-Save & Load: Your progress is secure. Build at your own pace—your bank will be waiting exactly where you left it.

Modern Visuals: Watch your small office grow into a towering financial headquarters
70010000120330.name: Build A Bank Tycoon

70010000120347.description:
Step into the scorching sands of the Persian Gulf, 1991. Coalition forces are pushing deep into Iraqi-held territory, and every dune, every bombed-out building, every oil-choked horizon is a potential kill zone. Desert Storm War drops you into the heart of Operation Desert Storm as a special operations soldier fighting alongside a squad of AI teammates across brutal, tactically demanding frontlines.

Lead Your Squad. Hold the Line.
You never fight alone. Your team of combat-hardened bot soldiers reacts to the battlefield in real time — laying down suppressive fire, flanking enemy positions, and calling out threats. But the enemy is just as organized. Opposing bot teams move with coordination and aggression, adapting to your tactics across every engagement. No two firefights play out the same way.

A War That Feels Real
Desert Storm War is built around one goal: authenticity. Powered by a full IK (Inverse Kinematics) character system, every soldier on the battlefield moves like a human being, not a puppet.

Full Foot IK — Boots plant naturally on uneven terrain, rocky embankments, and rubble-strewn streets. No more floating soldiers or clipping feet.
Arm IK — Weapons are gripped and braced dynamically. Lean against cover, climb obstacles, or crouch behind a wall and watch your soldier's arms adjust in real time.
Head-Look — Characters track threats, teammates, and movement with natural head turns and gaze direction, making every NPC feel aware, alive, and dangerous.

The result is a squad of soldiers that look and move like they actually belong in a warzone.

Fight through a series of distinct operational levels drawn from the Gulf War conflict — desert highway ambushes, urban clearing operations in occupied Kuwait, fortified bunker assaults, and open-terrain armored pushes under the blazing Middle Eastern sun. Each level presents a different tactical challenge, forcing you to adapt your approach, manage your squad, and outgun a well-organized enemy force.
70010000120347.intro: The desert doesn't forgive. Neither do you.
70010000120347.name: Desert Storm War FPS

70010000120448.description:
You’re a blogger investigating a string of disappearances inside a closed public park. What was once an ordinary green space is now silent, empty… and wrong.

Explore dark pathways, abandoned buildings, and shadowed woods as strange sounds echo around you. Footsteps follow. Whispers drift between the trees. The deeper you search for answers, the more your mind begins to turn against you.

Horror Park is a psychological horror experience focused on atmosphere, exploration, and slow-building dread.
70010000120448.name: Horror Park

70050000070955.description:
With this DLC, you'll unlock:
- A cute and cozy forest map
- 9 natural hairstyles
- 2 fantasy outfits
- 2 grassy hats
- 2 leafy accessories

Bake yourself a fresh new look!
70050000070955.intro: Create the coziest bakery in town!
70050000070955.name: Bun Buns: Cozy DLC

70050000070957.description:
With this DLC, you'll unlock:
- A cute and cozy dream map
- 9 pastel hairstyles
- 2 colorful outfits
- 2 cute hats
- 2 dreamy accessories

Bake yourself a fresh new look!
70050000070957.intro: Become the cutest baker in town!
70050000070957.name: Bun Buns: Cute DLC

70070000034204.description:
Enjoy this party game bundle packed with dozens of sports game and unexpected activities to play solo or with friends and family.
This bundle includes:

- Sports Camp: A 35-Game Adventure
- Instant Sports
- Instant Sports Winter Games
- Instant Sports Summer Games
70070000034204.intro: Access 50 party games and compete with your friends and family in local co-op.
70070000034204.name: Sports Challenge: 50+ Games Edition

70070000034941.description:
Take control of a mighty dinosaur in a post-apocalyptic world on a quest to recover its stolen eggs.

Smash through environments, gather resources, and hunt grotesque human-mutants to evolve and grow stronger. Use what you collect to rebuild bridges, restore paths and push deeper into a world filled with danger and mystery. 

Explore vast landscapes, uncover hidden secrets and face terrifying bosses standing between you and your lost brood.

Features:
- Unleash powerful evolution form with Celestosaurus skin
- Break everything: destroy environments and leave nothing standing
- Use advanced technology: encounter futuristic machines that will aid your survival
- Engage in fierce battles: hunt down mutants and monstrous creatures
- Meet various enemies: take on diverse foes with unique behaviors
- Lead your warriors: command other beasts and dominate the wasteland
- Evolve to become a super beast: grow stronger with every challenge you overcome!
- Use 400 Meat, 15 Mutagen and 500 Gems to power up your evolution and make your raptor stronger in every battle

Will you survive and recover your eggs?
70070000034941.name: Raptor Evolution: Godly Edition

70070000034959.description:
Your friends are scattered across the city, and the rail network is in pieces! Draw colored tracks, reconnect the railroads, and guide trains back to their stations to find your lost buddies and bring everyone home.

With each rescue, your hometown slowly recovers, but the puzzles get trickier. Tunnels, crossroads, and clever obstacles will test your logic and creativity as you invent new routes, solve mind-bending challenges, and restore order to the railways.

Features:
- 1000+ handcrafted logic puzzles!
- 120 extra-large levels full of challenges!
- Tricky mechanics like gates, crossroads, and obstacles.
- Multiple solutions that reward creative thinking!
- Optional hints to help you through tougher levels.
- A beautiful city full of life waiting to be restored!

Choo Choo! Next station is never-ending fun!
70070000034959.intro: Your train crashed! Find your friends and rebuild your home!
70070000034959.name: Rail Rescue: Puzzle Lines - Complete Edition

70010000106031.description:
About Homura: The Crimson Warriors  
Fourteen years have gone by since the Battle of Sekigahara split Japan in two.

Now firmly in power, the Tokugawa shogunate is scheming to wipe out the Toyotomi clan, a long-standing thorn in its side.

In response, the Toyotomi clan has decided to take on the Tokugawa head-to-head, using Osaka Castle as their base. Pleas for support were sent to daimyo all across the country, but only a handful answered the call. Among these brave warriors was Nobushige Sanada, the second son of the Sanada family, who was exiled to Mt. Kudo under house arrest after the Battle of Sekigahara.

Joining Nobushige in his escape from Mt. Kudo are the Sanada Ten Braves—ten loyal ninjas who served him even after their banishment. Standing in their way are the Ura Yagyu, a band of assassins who’ve carried out countless killings on shogunate orders, mysterious swordsmen, and formidable warriors.

This is the final chapter of the Warring States period—a story about the bonds and way of life shared by Nobushige Sanada and the Ten Braves as they gather at Osaka Castle.

Key Features  
Amongst the fire and ashes, love will prevail — Originally released in Japan in 2018, Western fans can now experience this historical fantasy otome, where protagonist Mutsumi Mochizuki fights alongside the Crimson Warriors. With multiple endings and CG illustrations, this legendary tale of love — interwoven with iconic historical events and original characters from the Warring States period — is sure to capture the hearts of historical otome fans.

Stay at your best with Energy Reading — Use Energy Reading to check the affection level and Ring status of your love interests. Mutsumi has a special ability to adjust the love interests' Rings. Speeding them up lets them tap into unique powers, but at the expense of their physical health. Be sure to keep their Rings in balance! If their health drops too low, the consequences could be serious…

Ninja Guidance — Use your ninja scrolls to keep track of your progress in the story and revisit past moments if you want a different outcome. Adjust both affection and ring levels with each warrior as you replay earlier scenes to change the course of history!

Path of the Samurai — As you progress through the story, you can level up your ninja rank to keep up with the Crimson Warriors in battle. Hone your ninja skills, aim for Master rank, and lead your allies to victory against the Ura Yagyu!
70010000106031.intro: Ignite the fire within the Crimson Warriors’ hearts in their ultimate showdown!
70010000106031.name: Homura: The Crimson Warriors

70010000106032.description: The Digital Short Stories feature five tales—one for each love interest. In 20 pages, discover what goes on beyond the battlefield and just how heated things can get!
70010000106032.intro: Ignite the fire within the Crimson Warriors’ hearts in their ultimate showdown!
70010000106032.name: Homura: The Crimson Warriors Digital Short Stories

70010000106033.description:
Sometimes you need a break from the battlefield (and the romance). Give the Digital Soundtrack a listen — it’s sure to soothe your soul and pull at your heartstrings!

Tracklist (26 tracks):
Composer: Yuki Sugiura (STUDIO EDEN INC.)

1. Turmoil
2. Daylight
3. Sunlight Dancing Through Trees
4. Secret Meeting
5. Twilight
6. Flirtation
7. Heartstrings
8. Longing
9. Feast
10. Loneliness
11. Sorrow
12. Darkness
13. Alarm
14. Battle
15. Heartbeat
16. Rising Courage
17. Defensive Stance
18. Despair
19. Awakening
20. A Dream Within a Dream
21. Eternity
22. Intertwined Fates
23. Parting
24. Soul
25. Full Moon
26. True Love
70010000106033.intro: Ignite the fire within the Crimson Warriors’ hearts in their ultimate showdown!
70010000106033.name: Homura: The Crimson Warriors Digital Soundtrack

70050000065172.description:
Prince Azure, Monsieur Brunette, Mrs White, Madame Rose, Miss Peach and Inspector Gray join the modern Cluedo digital game!

Redesigned and updated for the modern era, this pack contains twelve new suspect tokens that can be used on any crime scene you own.

Whether you’ve been waiting eagerly for their return or you’re meeting them for the first time,  when you add the Legacy Suspect Pack to your game, you can play the most iconic, nostalgic version of Cluedo!  

INCLUDES:
- 2 x PRINCE AZURE TOKENS – Give the prince a royal welcome to the modern Cluedo digital game!
- 2 x MONSIEUR BRUNETTE TOKENS – The roguish con artist swindles his way back onto the board.
- 2 x MRS WHITE TOKENS – The original Mrs White makes her grand return to the game.
- 2 x MADAME ROSE TOKENS – Madame Rose always knew she’d come back to Cluedo someday…
- 2 x MISS PEACH TOKENS – The Southern belle graces the board with her presence once more! 
- 2 x INSPECTOR GRAY TOKENS – This corrupt cop finds the Cluedo board again!
70050000065172.intro: More fan-favourite legacy suspects return to Cluedo!
70050000065172.name: Cluedo: Legacy Suspect Pack

70070000033873.description:
Take on the Ura Yagyu and capture the hearts of the Crimson Warriors with the Deluxe Edition! This bundle includes the digital game, five short stories each with a sizzling romance for one of the five love interests, and a digital soundtrack featuring 26 tracks!

The Deluxe Edition includes:
・Digital Standard Edition
・Digital Short Stories (20 pages)
・Digital Soundtrack (26 tracks)
70070000033873.intro: Ignite the fire within the Crimson Warriors’ hearts in their ultimate showdown!
70070000033873.name: Homura: The Crimson Warriors Deluxe Edition

70010000093950.description:
You are hired as a mini-golf level tester by the french company ROGOLF. Management will always expect big quality scores from your golfing skills... 
Thanks to the help of the Smuggler, cheat your way through the floors of this strange office building, or get fired trying to !
Bonuses you buy will grant you access to secret rooms, rule-breaking cards and make your score explode !
In need of a day off ? Try the "Team Building" multiplayer game mode, and play locally with up to 4 players.
70010000093950.intro:
Play mini-golf, buy equipment and score enough points to reach the top.
Each level has its own rules and each game is different.
70010000093950.name: ROGOLF

70010000103642.description:
Break the witch's curse on your home as you explore five distinct regions, each hiding a sacred key to unlock the village chest.

Features:
- Despite the bright graphics, this game is definitely not for children!
- Memorable characters with their own personality
- Ultra-high resolution artworks
- Unconventional humor
- Some evil creatures
70010000103642.intro: Solve the wacky point & click puzzles filled with horror and humor!
70010000103642.name: NubiaPhobia

70010000111132.description:
Morkull Ascend to the Gods is a 2D action video game focused on boss battles, once again taking control of the charismatic God of Death: Morkull.

Set in the original world of Morkull Ragast's Rage, locked up and aware that he is in a new video game, you must help him escape so that he can carry out his evil plans for the world and rule by subjecting everyone to his will (yes, including you).

You will feel the power and bear the weight of being the God of Death and Darkness. A select series of battles against other henchmen, minions, and Gods that make up the Olympus of the Kingdom of Midaldus await you.

But don't worry, don't tremble. You won't be alone. You'll have Morkull (or rather, he'll have you), who has a wide range of combos, skills, and charms that you can unlock, equip, and build to your liking before each battle.

Although you'll also die a good handful of times.

Morkull is back!

This means that his charisma, character, and personality, along with his breaking of the fourth wall, will create a lighthearted atmosphere at all times (you're going to need it), loaded with bad jokes, references, and memes that are very present in pop culture.

It's like having a friend playing alongside you.

Like its predecessor, Morkull Ascend to the Gods is completely hand-drawn and animated, with great care and frame by frame. In this way, thanks to traditional animation, the characters' movements are very natural and full of life.

Distinguished by a stylized character and a wide color palette, this time, outside of Ragast, you will be able to see and discover other environments that belong to the Kingdom of Midaldus.

Morkull is back! So get back in trouble with him and join his ranks by supporting his Machiavellian cause.
70010000111132.intro: Get in trouble with Morkull again!
70010000111132.name: Morkull Ascend to the Gods

70010000115123.description:
■ MotionRec is a "recording puzzle action" game.

Use the ability to record your own movements and play them back elsewhere to explore a world of devastation.

You can record the trajectory of your movements, from walking to jumping. Use stage gimmicks to create and record more complex movements to traverse the world.

■ Record your movements and play them back in another location!

This will let you reach places too high to jump up to, or even access spots where there's nothing to stand on.

Make good use of the MotionRec ability to unravel the mysteries behind this devastated world ruled by machines!
70010000115123.intro: Use stage gimmicks to create and record more complex movements to traverse the world.
70010000115123.name: MotionRec

70010000117911.description: Move the Nintendo Switch™ to guide balls through a growing collection of real life handcrafted mazes.
70010000117911.intro: Move the Nintendo Switch™ to guide balls through handcrafted mazes.
70010000117911.name: Game With Balls

70010000118880.description:
After breaking up with Erika, Bianca's life unravels once more when a second magic camera appears and a new girl, Lúcia, enters the scene. Will she reconnect with Erika or explore a new path with the mysterious student council president?

Magic Exposure 2 is a cute yuri-themed visual novel adventure with a supernatural twist! Take the role of Bianca in a story spanning 15,000 words and featuring 2 romance options to date. Make critical choices for Bianca to affect the narrative and explore multiple endings, unlocking special CG scenes along the way!

• Follow the tale of unlikely companions in a world of anthropomorphic characters!
• Enjoy cute and romantic dialogue spanning a story of 15,000 words.
• Use convenient features to auto-advance, save, load or skip!
• Make key choices for the protagonist and unlock special CG scenes.
• Explore themes of girls’ love with 2 different characters to date!
70010000118880.intro: Find new love or mend a broken relationship as you make key choices in a yuri-themed visual novel adventure!
70010000118880.name: Magic Exposure 2

70010000119212.description:
Get ready for the most important mission in the zoo: making sure the laziest and most adorable panda in the world reaches its favorite bamboo!

In Panda Keeper, you take on the role of the keeper and must use logic, patience, and a bit of strategy to push the big fluffy buddy around the enclosure without getting him stuck in tight corners. Each level is a new habitat filled with rocks, fences, and corridors that turn a simple “little push” into a delightful brain teaser.

With 30 short and clever stages, the game is perfect for relaxing while keeping your mind active. There’s no ticking clock, no pressure — just you, the panda, and that magical moment when everything lines up perfectly… and he finally sits down happily to munch on bamboo.

Made a wrong move? No problem! Use Undo to test new ideas or Restart to begin fresh. Here, experimenting is part of the fun.

Cute, clear, and satisfying, Panda Keeper is perfect for anyone who loves calm puzzles, strategic challenges, and the simple joy of seeing a well-fed panda at the end of each level.
70010000119212.name: Panda Keeper

70010000119788.description: Your army awaits orders! Put the right units on the right line at the right time and win every battle you enter. No excuses for the enemy!
70010000119788.intro: General, prepare your army for victorious battles. Select the card and make your first move!
70010000119788.name: Hearthstorm

70010000119970.description:
Start learning Japanese with Hiragana—the essential first step.
In this simple fill-in-the-blank quiz game, a missing character is hidden with a circle. Choose the correct Hiragana to complete each word!

Short questions make it perfect for quick study sessions, and repeated play helps you recognize shapes and readings naturally. Great for beginners, refreshers, and families learning together.

Fun Hiragana practice with fill-in-the-blank quizzes

Easy controls, quick rounds

Build reading basics through repetition
70010000119970.intro: Learn Hiragana fast—fill-in-the-blank quizzes for Japanese beginners.
70010000119970.name: Japanese Basics HIRAGANA Fill-in Quiz

70010000120287.description:
Travel through Time! In this cozy hidden-object adventure, cats and friends explore the contrast between a magical past and a high-tech future. Every detail invites you to discover that whether in a castle or a skyscraper, friendship and fun are timeless.

Start your journey in The Old Kingdom, a peaceful medieval citadel where everyday life unfolds with gentle humor. Watch clumsy trainees, wandering performers, and eccentric adventurers in a world inspired by classic RPGs, full of warm encounters and legendary charm.

Then, warp into The New Frontier to visit Neo-Cat Metropolis. Explore a bustling city of glass towers and floating platforms where robots get confused and flying cars break down. Amidst the neon lights, discover that friends helping friends is what truly keeps the future moving.

Features:

- Cats and Friends: Find delightful characters in two detailed scenes—one from a mythic past and one from a comic future.
- Balloon-Popping Fun: Enjoy relaxing gameplay as you pop balloons across the scenes—a bit of fun with every search!
- Rich Details: Explore beautifully illustrated settings that blend fantasy and sci-fi with visual storytelling in every corner.
- Over 600 Items to Find! Search for 202 cats, 202 unique characters, and colorful balloons hidden throughout the ages.
- Atmospheric Soundtrack: Set the tone with immersive music tailored to match each era—from cozy medieval tunes to chill futuristic beats.
- Family-Friendly Fun: With cozy, pressure-free gameplay and intuitive controls, it’s an experience for all ages. Perfect for relaxing together or playing solo.

Celebrate the connection between myth and machine in this heartwarming journey—where every moment is worth remembering.
70010000120287.intro: Join cute cats in a time-travel adventure! Find feline friends and pop balloons as you explore a magical medieval kingdom and a chaotic sci-fi metropolis.
70010000120287.name: Meow Moments: Celebrating Myth & Machine

70010000120293.description:
Survive the Night. Escape the Dead.

Darkness descends and the undead rise. Armed with only a handful of weapons and the shelter of an abandoned house, you must fight to see the sunrise. Can you hold out, or be overwhelmed?

Features

Retro arcade thrills with modern polish

Gorgeous 16-bit pixel art bursting with personality

Spooky, toe-tapping chiptune soundtrack

Play solo or team up in local co-op

Arcade and Survival modes for endless action

Compete on leaderboards for 1 or 2 players

20 pulse pounding stages of undead mayhem

6 unique weapons and items to aid your survival

Collect hidden letters to unlock a devastating super weapon

Black & White and CRT filters for an authentic horror atmosphere
70010000120293.intro: Living Dead House delivers a pulse pounding, classic arcade experience. Battle through waves of the undead solo or team up with a friend.
70010000120293.name: Living Dead House

70010000096340.description:
Silence swallows everything.
Twelve female inmates watch you from the shadows—beautiful, dangerous, and disturbingly captivating.
They are not looking for love… they are looking for control.

Their words are poisoned caresses, their gestures, traps disguised as desire.
Here, every glance can draw you closer… or drag you into their deadly game.

Will you become their confidant, their obsession… or their next victim?


Features:

● 12 dangerously irresistible minds — From the manipulative temptress who spins lies like silk, to the sweet psychopath who loves without knowing how to stop destroying.

● Seduce or survive — Every word matters. Every silence screams. Play with their emotions… or fall into their trap.

● Limited time — The clock is ticking. Love them and you might survive… or be damned.

● Multiple endings — Romance, betrayal, death… or something far worse. Your fate is in your hands.

● Hidden secrets — Break through their masks and make them fall for you to unlock seductive illustrations revealing their most intimate—and twisted—side.


They are waiting.
And they won't give up.

Here, love is a weapon, passion is poison… and you are the perfect prey.

Dare to play.
But remember:
Sometimes, the one who swears eternal love
is the one digging your grave.
70010000096340.intro:
Twelve prisoners. One single goal: seduce you, possess you… and break you.
Unless you make them fall in love with you first.
70010000096340.name: Date with a Psycho Killer Girl: A Love Story & Horror Show Series

70010000096968.description:
Navigate through mysterious waters aboard a ship where danger, longing, and secrets pulse with every wave.

Meet irresistible pirates, each with their own wild magnetism and hidden scars, and accompany them not only in their adventures... but also through the emotional storms they carry within.

Through provocative questions, strategic combinations of magical fruits, and intense moments, unlock daring images and endings as fiery as they are unpredictable.

Each pirate hides much more than what their tattoos and challenging gazes reveal.

Can you truly read their deepest desires… and conquer their untamed heart?


Features:

● Unique dual gameplay: Switch between intimate questions that reveal their soul and the Fruit of Destiny Merge mode, where you must combine mystical fruits to soothe their emotions and strengthen your bond.

● Provocative scenes and epic moments: Forge real connections by striking their heart and unlock suggestive illustrations and unforgettable encounters on the high seas.

● Explore their most vulnerable side: Every answer, every perfect fruit combination, unveils new layers of their personality, their deepest passions… and what they truly seek in someone like you.

● Multiple thrilling endings: Your choices, intuition, and strategic skills will determine the course of your adventure… and their heart.

● A secret and daring question: Reach the final moment to unlock a scene that will change everything.


Can you tame a pirate’s heart… while your own sinks deeper into desire?

Embark on a story where passion, adventure, and forbidden fruits intertwine upon the high seas,
and only the bravest will reach the true treasure… their forbidden heart.
70010000096968.intro: Sail the seas of desire… and merge forbidden fruits to capture the heart of your ideal pirate.
70010000096968.name: Pirate Anime Quest: One Girls' Journey, A Piece of Island Love

70010000113178.description:
Fast Food Van Simulator is a food truck experience where precision, speed, and strategy turn a small burger van into a thriving business. Step inside your fully interactive truck, prepare orders under pressure, satisfy demanding customers, and grow your culinary reputation one perfect burger at a time.

Each session challenges you to receive orders, cook accurately, serve quickly, earn points, and collect tips. The better your performance, the more you can invest in upgrades and expansion.

Prepare a wide range of burgers — from Classic and Cheesy Deluxe to Spicy, Double, Veggie, and Breakfast specialties. Add fries, salads, drinks, and milkshakes to complete combo meals. Special requests like “no onion” or extra toppings keep you on your toes.

Manage your stock carefully, restock ingredients in real time, and upgrade your equipment to handle multiple orders faster and more efficiently. Every second counts when patience bars start dropping.

Upgrade your grill, expand storage, unlock faster movement, automate ingredient drawers, and optimize your workflow layout to maximize profits.
Dynamic customers, VIP guests, expressive reactions, and increasing difficulty make every shift unique.

Key Features
- Real-time burger preparation and order management
- Wide variety of burger recipes and combo meals
- Customer patience system and dynamic reactions
- Points and tip-based reward system
- Equipment, speed, and storage upgrades
- Stylized 3D cartoon visuals with energetic soundtrack

Step inside your van, heat up the grill, and prove you have what it takes to turn pressure into profit. In Fast Food Van Simulator, every second matters and every perfect burger brings you closer to success.
70010000113178.intro: Heat the grill. Rule the street.
70010000113178.name: Fast Food Van Simulator

70010000113769.description:
Spy Guy is an amazing detective who searches for hidden objects in various locations and cities around the world. This time, he has been tasked with traveling to Europe to find hidden objects in European capitals and cities. 
Spy Guy Europe, with a new hint system and three game modes, is a great choice for anyone who loves searching for hidden objects and solving puzzles.
70010000113769.intro: Spy Guy sets out to conquer Europe in a brand new detective game!
70010000113769.name: Spy Guy Europe

70010000117529.description:
Manafinder is a RPG with rich exploration, nostalgic turn-based combat, and original pixel art.

In a vast and untapped world, powerful wild beasts roam the dangerous lands. A community of survivors known as the exiles depends on heroes like Lambda to obtain the power of manastones to keep their civilization safe.

Fight your way against ferocious beasts and other enemies in the quest for manastones as you define the fate of the exiled! 


Features
* Nostalgic fantasy role-playing game
* Explore the fantastical world of Aevi
* Meet diverse and interesting characters
* Collect items, weapons, and elemental ores
* Your choices matter
70010000117529.intro: Become a Manafinder and survive in an untamed magical world
70010000117529.name: Manafinder

70010000118429.description:
By day, they are untouchable icons.
By night… they are men with secrets.

The city sees fearless superheroes: symbols of strength, protectors of justice, living legends.
But when the masks come off, you discover the truth hidden beneath power and perfection.

Desire.
Tension.
Control.
Vulnerability.

Dangerous Superheroes After Dark: Heroes Behind the Mask is a narrative-driven gay dating visual novel where your choices shape your relationship with powerful anime superheroes living double lives.

Each hero hides more than his identity.
Behind the public image lies pressure, expectation… and a connection he can’t risk.

You’re not just another civilian.

You’re the one man who sees him, not the symbol, but the person.

Will you break through his walls?
Will you protect his secret?
Or will passion blur the line between hero and something far more dangerous?


FEATURES:

● POWERFUL HERO CAST: Meet anime superheroes with unique abilities, strong personalities, and hidden weaknesses.

● SECRET IDENTITIES: Discover who they really are when the mask comes off.

● CHOICE-DRIVEN ROMANCE: Your decisions influence trust, intimacy, and destiny.

● MULTIPLE STORY ROUTES: Each hero has branching paths and exclusive scenes.

● DIFFERENT ENDINGS: Romance, betrayal, obsession, redemption… or heartbreak.

● HIGH REPLAY VALUE: Unlock new dialogue, hidden moments, and alternate outcomes.


He fights villains in the shadows.
Will you be the one he lets in… after dark?
70010000118429.intro:
When the city sleeps, their control begins to slip.
Behind every mask… there’s a man who could ruin you.
Will you earn his trust or surrender to the danger?
70010000118429.name: Dangerous Superheroes After Dark: Heroes Behind the Mask

70010000120483.description:
Description:
Blast into VECTORED, a high-energy arcade shooter inspired by classic shoot ’em ups and rebuilt for modern play.

Take control of a fast, agile drone and dive into a dark, corrupted woodland where shadowy forms and glowing red signals collide. Within a single woodland-style arena, enemy AI units emerge endlessly, pressing in from all directions as the forest reacts to your presence.

There are no stages to clear and no breaks in the action. As your score climbs, the world pushes back harder, with faster enemies, tighter patterns, and increasing pressure that demands constant movement and sharp reflexes.

Like the arcade legends before it, VECTORED is easy to learn and instantly satisfying. But surviving the escalating chaos requires mastery, awareness, and total control of the airspace.

Built for quick pick-up-and-play sessions and endless score-chasing, VECTORED delivers that classic “one more run” feeling, set against a striking dark woodland world lit by red energy and motion.

Old-school roots. Modern reflexes.
70010000120483.intro: Pilot your drone through a dark, corrupted forest in VECTORED. Endless AI swarms adapt as your score rises. Easy to learn, brutal to master. Can you survive the swarm?
70010000120483.name: VECTORED

70010000120648.description: Extreme Garage: Offroad is a high-speed racing game. Get ready for the ultimate offroad racing challenge! Push your skills to the limit, earn cash and build a garage of high-performance cars.
70010000120648.name: Extreme Garage: Offroad

70010000120790.description:
Sprunki Hell Towers is a dynamic platformer with horror elements, where every jump matters.
You play as one of the Sprunki and climb sinister towers to save friends captured by the villain Black. Each tower is a separate trial with its own atmosphere, mechanics, and mood: from bright and almost cheerful levels to anxious, oppressive sections with horror elements.

The game is built on fair but demanding gameplay. Mistakes are punished, but always fairly — no randomness or injustice. Difficulty grows gradually, forcing you to learn, adapt, and feel real progress.

You'll experience:
• unique towers of varying height and difficulty
• diverse game mechanics that change from level to level
• stylish music and recognizable Sprunki characters
• vibrant environments that gradually become darker
• tense but captivating atmosphere

Sprunki Hell Towers is a game about overcoming, rhythm, and concentration. Climb higher, don't look back, and don't let Black keep your friends trapped.
70010000120790.intro: Vibrant platformer: conquer horror towers and save Sprunki from Black
70010000120790.name: Sprunki Hell Towers

70010000120796.description:
Take the wheel and launch into the sky in STUNT RACE — an adrenaline-fueled driving experience where gravity is just a suggestion.

DEFY THE LAWS OF PHYSICS
Race through impossible tracks suspended high above a sprawling city. Loop through aerial rings, dodge obstacles in the clouds, and prove your skills on death-defying courses designed to push your reflexes to the limit.

THREE WAYS TO PLAY
• STUNT RACE — Navigate twisted loops, floating platforms, and mid-air hazards in heart-pounding timed runs
• STRAIGHT ROAD — Hit top speed on an endless highway and launch off a massive ramp into the unknown
• PLAYGROUND — Your personal stunt arena with ramps, jumps, and room to experiment with insane tricks

POINTS FOR STYLE
Every second in the air counts. Flip, spin, and rotate your car to rack up points. The bigger the rotation, the bigger the reward. Land it clean or crash spectacularly — either way, it's a show.

FEEL THE IMPACT
Real damage physics mean every collision leaves its mark. Watch your car crumble, dent, and shatter as you push it beyond limits. Four unique vehicles, each ready to be destroyed in spectacular fashion.

CINEMATIC PRESENTATION
Stunning visuals with realistic lighting bring the city skyline to life beneath your wheels. An energetic soundtrack keeps your pulse racing from start to finish.

Strap in. Floor it. Fly.
70010000120796.intro: Fly through loops, smash cars & pull insane stunts above a stunning city skyline.
70010000120796.name: Stunt Race

70050000055178.description: The SHINOBI: Art of Vengeance SEGA Villains Stage includes an additional stage featuring some of SEGA's most legendary villains and foes, including Dr. Eggman. Coming Early 2026
70050000055178.name: SHINOBI: Art of Vengeance - SEGA Villains Stage

70010000097720.description:
Fit and Fry: Mise en Place is a casual puzzle game set in a restaurant, where every challenge takes place inside a frying pan. The goal is to perfectly organize the ingredients on the board, fulfilling customer orders and progressing through 40 levels that mix strategy and fun.

The mechanics are easy to learn yet addictive to master: move, rotate, and position the ingredients until everything fits in the right place. As you advance, the grids become larger and more complex, demanding more and more planning.

Customer orders work as extra challenges, rewarding players with stars if they aim to complete everything. While optional, they add replayability and bring more flavor to the experience.

The game starts with introductory levels to learn the rules, moves on to intermediate stages with conveyor belts and a greater variety of ingredients, challenges players in advanced stages with nearly maximum-sized boards, and culminates in the final levels that test everything learned so far.

With a smooth difficulty curve, engaging atmosphere, and always creative challenges, Fit and Fry: Mise en Place is the perfect dish for puzzle fans and casual players.
70010000097720.name: Fit and Fry: Mise En Place

70010000110700.description:
PULMO is the ideological continuation of ALVEOLE and the second part in a trilogy about the human journey. Our project explores human behavior in a society where everyone will find their own meanings. Your goal is to change the environment around you to influence people's behavior by solving spatial puzzles. The crowd in the game acts according to its own rules, sometimes helping, sometimes interfering, but always reacting to your actions.

Take control of the fate of a lone wanderer, challenging the silent crowds in a series of mysterious trials. There is no rush here, no victory or defeat - just a quiet dialog between you and the game. Follow this short but meaningful journey, absorbing every moment like the last ray of sunset.

Features:
- Unique art style combining 3D graphics and minimalistic hand-drawn style.
- High-quality music and audio accompaniment for full immersion in what is happening.
- Unsimilar puzzles with different complexity.
- Cutscenes and levels with deep narrative.
- Each cutscene has been worked out to the last detail.

«No matter how large the crowd around you may be, you will be left alone in the last moment. No matter how rich you may be, you will be a beggar in the end. No matter how dazzling your luck may seem, its wings will turn to dust. No matter how much joy you sow on your way, the harvest will be bitter.»
70010000110700.intro: PULMO is a casual puzzle game where you control a lone character in a world full of faceless crowds.
70010000110700.name: PULMO

70010000118264.description:
This pack includes the games: Hypercar & Speedway Racing.

In Hypercar Racing you'll enjoy the dirtiest, fastest, and most spectacular races at speeds over 200 Mp/h, avoiding multiple collisions against 8 adversaries. The game has different modes, such as Championship, Arcade, and 4-player multiplayer.

In Speedway Racing, you will enjoy the fastest, most spectacular races at over 350 Km/h, avoiding multiple collisions against 12 rivals.
There are several modes available, including Championship, Arcade and 4-player multiplayer.

Features:

- Wide variety of tracks.
- Multi-player with 4 players.
- Races with 12 opponents.
- Realistic driving physics.
- Lots of Rock 'N Roll music.
70010000118264.intro: Enjoy 2 games in 1 with this irresistible speed games pack!
70010000118264.name: Asphalt Racing Bundle Hypercar & Speedway

70010000120561.description:
Jump across unlikely platforms, balance on crazy objects, and prove that feline curiosity truly has no limits.

Collect coins along the way and unlock new cats to customize your adventure. Beware of ghosts that may attack you along the path.

The real challenge? Stay calm, calculate every jump, and prove that no obstacle is too great for a cat!
70010000120561.intro: Take control of a fearless cat on a vertical journey, always upward.
70010000120561.name: Cat-up!

70010000121945.description:
Relax and play through 100 levels of classic TriPeaks Solitaire wrapped in a cozy farm setting. Clear cards by chaining sequences up or down across three peaks, using power-ups when you're stuck and Undo whenever you need a second chance.
Collect daily rewards to earn extra power-ups and coins, and work your way through every level at your own pace — no time limits, no pressure.
Features:

- 100 levels of TriPeaks Solitaire
- Farm-themed visuals and card art
- Power-ups to help on tough levels
- Undo your last move at any time
- Daily rewards
70010000121945.intro: Farm-themed TriPeaks Solitaire with 100 levels, daily rewards, power-ups
70010000121945.name: Farming TriPeaks Solitaire

70050000066416.description:
Celebrate springtime with this special Easter outfit! 
Dress your character in a colorful holiday look that’s perfect for egg hunts and festive farm adventures. 
This DLC contains the following clothing set: Colorful Outfit.
70050000066416.name: Sugardew Island - Easter Costume

70070000032314.description:
Take care of your animals and your farm, sell your goods to the cute Forest Folk, upgrade your farm, and fulfill small orders from the Harmony Tree to fill the tiny island with life again. 

If you wish, you can go on dates with friendly locals, each with their own unique personality and backstory!
70070000032314.intro: Run your own farm shop, without any pressure!
70070000032314.name: Sugardew Island - Easter Bundle

70070000032562.description:
This pack includes the games:

-Rock ´N Racing Off Road DX
-Golf Up
-Darts Up
-Touchdown Pinball
70070000032562.intro: Enjoy 4 games in 1 with this irresistible games pack!
70070000032562.name: 4 in 1 Sports Bundle Vol 3

70010000120327.description:
Cozy Bay Hike is a relaxing exploration game where you wander across a charming island, uncovering every hidden location at your own pace. There are no enemies, no timers, and no pressure — just you, the breeze, and a beautifully crafted world waiting to be discovered.

Features:
> Peaceful island exploration
> Discover hidden locations
> Complete your discovery journal
> Relaxing atmosphere & soundtrack
> Simple, cosy gameplay
70010000120327.intro: Welcome to your next peaceful adventure.
70010000120327.name: Cozy Bay Hike

70010000120310.description:
Travel the world in this cozy hidden-object adventure inspired by real cities like Tokyo, Paris, Rio, and Venice. 

Explore charming hand-drawn scenes, relax, decorate, and discover hidden treasures across iconic destinations.

Features

- Explore iconic cities from around the world in cozy, hand-drawn scenes
- Find hidden objects and complete relaxing missions at your own pace
- Decorate charming locations and bring each city to life
Unlock new destinations and collect unique souvenirs
- Create levels to share with the world and play levels made by other players
- Enjoy a peaceful soundtrack and soothing visuals

Slow down and enjoy the simple joy of discovery, one city at a time.
70010000120310.intro: Cozy hidden-object adventure across iconic world cities
70010000120310.name: Hidden around the World

70010000093311.description:
The classic shooter/RPG is back and better than ever! Featuring a unique mix of side-scrolling shoot-'em-up space battles and top-down planetary exploration, Sigma Star Saga DX is an explosive genre mashup that lets you take control of Allied Earth Federation pilot Ian Recker and infiltrate the alien Krill Empire as a double agent in a last-ditch effort to save mankind. 

With loyalties divided between humans and Krill, you must investigate six planets using an ever-expanding set of tools and abilities, and jump into the cockpit to engage enemy forces in intense shmup-style combat using more than 70 different Gun Data items. Gorgeous pixel-art graphics, epic boss battles, and a twist-filled story with multiple endings await. 

The new DX version adds numerous refinements over the original 2005 release, including an improved map, decreased random encounter rate, rebalanced EXP system, enhanced dialogue, additional save points, assorted bug fixes and quality-of-life updates, and more.

Key Features:
• The handheld classic returns after 20 years!
• Top-down RPG-style exploration mixed with action-packed space-shooter battles!
• Survive as a double agent for the humans and the Krill, and discover the secret of the six planets
• Stunning pixel-art graphics and fantastic soundtrack
• Explore using tools like the Scanner, Krill Boots, Wings, and more
• Customize your ship with more than 70 different Gun Data items yielding 15,000+ combinations
• Branching story with multiple endings
• The definitive DX version adds an improved map, decreased random encounter rate, rebalanced EXP system, updated script, various bug fixes, and other enhancements
70010000093311.intro: Half shoot-'em-up, half RPG! Blast through an intergalactic genre mashup!
70010000093311.name: Sigma Star Saga DX

70010000101011.description:
Eko and the Bewitched Lands: Rescue, Survive, Repeat!

Master the Elements and Defy the Dark Queen!
Princess in peril? Best friend kidnapped? It’s just another Tuesday for Eko. Dive into a charming yet ruthless world where your reflexes are your best ally. Eko and the Bewitched Lands blends fast-paced action with deep roguelike strategy, ensuring no two rescue missions are ever the same.

Adapt or Perish
Why play the same way twice? Discover a massive arsenal of weapons, mystical artifacts, and game-changing abilities. Will you become a whirlwind of steel, or a strategic mastermind using the environment to crush your foes? The choice isn’t just about style—it’s about survival.

High-Stakes Exploration
The Bewitched Lands are alive and ever-changing. Uncover ancient relics that grant god-like power... or trigger a deadly curse. Every corner hides a secret, and every secret is a gamble. Do you dare to decipher the runes?

Why you’ll love it:
- Adrenaline-Fueled Combat: Master the perfect dodge and unleash devastating elemental combos (Fire, Water, and beyond!).
- Infinite Variety: Randomly generated layouts and hundreds of upgrade combinations mean a fresh challenge every run.
- Brain & Brawn: It's not just about hitting hard; use puzzle-solving skills and the environment to outsmart the Dark Queen’s minions.
- Charming Chaos: Experience a magical, vibrant atmosphere that hides a punishing, rewarding difficulty curve.
70010000101011.intro: Help Eko rescue the Princess (and his best friend!) from the Dark Queen in this charming, fast-paced roguelike action RPG!
70010000101011.name: Eko and the Bewitched Lands

70010000119331.description:
A voice is saying your name. A WWII-era machine, long hidden in a church basement, whirs to life. Through a crackling speaker, a man asks you to find a stolen book. He only knows the title. Time is running out.

The machine, created by Bletchley Park engineers Cecil Caulderly and Beatrice Dooler, contains a vast archive of obscure books, letters, and journals fed in over the span of fifty years in an attempt to crack the code of reality. As their lives fell apart, the machine kept working.

Navigate the computer’s archive. Link its obscure texts and uncover its creators’ secrets. Communicate with the man behind the speaker to figure out your role in this mystery. Destroy the book at the core of the machine — before it’s too late.

NARRATIVE DEDUCTION

• Deduce links through the archive to locate hidden sources.

• Unravel the stories and unearth the secrets of the books’ authors and the machine's creators.

• Map the archive and find the book that will rewrite the world.

INTERACTIVE AUDIO DRAMA

• Talk with your handler at any time, creating a dynamic audio drama that responds as you explore.

• Featuring the voices of Rebekah McLoughlin, Paul Warren and Phillipe Bosher.

• Original soundtrack by Laurence Chapman.

Written and created by the award-winning team behind Heaven's Vault, Overboard!, and A Highland Song.
70010000119331.intro: A World War II computer. An archive of lost books. A world-changing secret. Narrative deduction meets audio drama, from the creators of Heaven's Vault.
70010000119331.name: TR-49

70010000004515.description: Enjoy traditional Pokémon battles using familiar mechanics such as Pokémon Types, abilities, and moves, enabling rich and varied battle strategies that Trainers know and love.
70010000004515.intro: Pokémon Champions is coming to Nintendo Switch!
70010000004515.name: Pokémon Champions

70010000105658.description:
Our planet is under attack from the Star Spores, and they've warped life on Earth into ferocious uber-bugs.

Even worse, a nasty alien has made its new home directly attached to your head.

But it's not all bad news - your new best friend has provided both the strength to fight back against the mutated horde, and control over a weapon that can tip the balance of the battle in humanity's favor: the ChainStaff.

As you traverse the surreal landscape, you'll encounter your fellow soldiers, stranded in harsh environments. Do you rescue your comrades or listen to the alien voice in your head and harvest them for upgrades?

If you can persevere and defeat the Star Spores, perhaps you can save everyone…including yourself."
GAME FEATURES
MASTER THE CHAINSTAFF
Hurl it as a spear and slice aliens in half. Throw it to the ground as a shield to stop incoming attacks. Grapple and swing on just about anything. The transforming ChainStaff does all this and more, and all with one button, it’s all up to you.
YOU DIED
Pounded to mush, stabbed through the heart, sheared in two. Prepare to meet your doom in a myriad of disgusting ways. All deaths are avoidable, but some dangers may require special strategies.
FEROCIOUS FOES
The creatures of Earth have been mutated by aliens: you’ll come across dozens of unusual creatures, and once you get past those, you’ll have to fight against screen-filling monstrosities.
GROTESQUE UPGRADES
Stranded soldiers dot the landscape of ChainStaff. You must choose whether to rescue them or devour their organs; each option has unique benefits and will lead to different endings.
10 WILD LEVELS
"Mist trails through rocky crags.
Wind blows over icy, moon-lit hills.
Water streams down mossy cliffs.
Fully hand-drawn art immerses you in a living world inspired by album covers of the 70s and 80s."
KILLER SOUNDTRACK
"Scorching riffs and peals of thunder. Pumping beats drive you ever forward.
Rock out to the classic metal soundtrack by the award-winning composer Deon van Heerden of Broforce and Warhammer 40k: Shootas Blood & Teef soundtrack fame. There’s some lighter interludes with 70s synth, catchy melodies, and even some cowbell. Now it’s back to the heavy tracks, where it’s time to bang your head while smashing skulls.

All depictions of violence are 2 dimensional and heavily stylized. As part of your quest to cleanse Earth of the Star Spore menace, you'll use all the weapons at your disposal to defeat your foes, many of whom will die bloody deaths. Additionally, you may harvest resources from your fellow soldiers in order to increase the power of the alien keeping you alive, and this process is messy.
70010000105658.intro: ChainStaff is a brutal action-platformer with a transforming spear and grappling hook, blazing weapon upgrades, and a rocking soundtrack.
70010000105658.name: ChainStaff

70010000110455.description:
Immerse yourself in the chilling tale of the Chen Family Village, where a mother searching for her missing daughter accidentally stumbles into a haunted place filled with mysterious cults. Guide Jia Jun Lee as she searches a village and pieces together fragile clues to her loved one’s whereabouts, carefully hiding her movements as supernatural threats close in from all sides.

Incantation is a first-person horror-themed adventure game adapted from the live action film of the same name. Beyond the palpable madness and fear in the village, there's a sinister force that drives one to despair. What happens when one crosses the forbidden line of this evil deity?

Perform rituals, solve puzzles, collect documents and hunt for key items to access new areas of the village, all in hopes of finding your missing daughter and escaping alive!

• Explore a remote village that harbors evil secrets and worships malicious spirits!
• Search for clues to your missing daughter’s whereabouts while evading your pursuers.
• Unravel an eerie ritual and discover its deep secrets!
• Solve environmental puzzles and collect key items to gain access to new areas.
• Enjoy an immersive cinematic experience inspired by Taiwanese culture and traditions!
70010000110455.intro: Brave the darkness of a haunted village in hopes of finding a lost loved one!
70010000110455.name: Incantation

70010000103228.description:
A century after the legendary artist Orwiel vanished, Sion and Michelle begin a journey to uncover his final works. Along the way, they encounter Liara, a mysterious girl who has lost her memories. What she carries holds the power to alter their path and entwine their fates, drawing the party into a story of art, destiny, and hidden truths in a classic fantasy world.

This classic command-based JRPG features a 3D isometric map interface and smooth, dynamic battle animations. Explore dungeons and engage in easy-to-learn turn-based combat inspired by old-school RPGs. Enhance weapons at the blacksmith, learn up to five skills per character, and strengthen those skills through repeated use as their power and effects evolve. Build the SP gauge during battle to unleash powerful special abilities, and expend it all at once to trigger devastating combo attacks with your allies.
70010000103228.intro: Explore isometric dungeons and master evolving skills in a classic JRPG
70010000103228.name: Tears Revolude

70010000104937.description:
This game is a drone simulation game that allows you to experience real drone flight based on footage shot by a real flying drone. 
There is no up, down, left or right direction control, only the control to increase or decrease the drone speed. 
You can also change the drone's flight mode from Normal, Sport, and Eco to any of the 3. 

Enjoy the beautiful scenery of Hujeong Auditorium, Korea with "Real" footage! 
There are a total of 2 flight courses in 1 areas.
High-definition footage faithfully reproduces the atmosphere of real nature, providing a strong sense of immersion in the game. 
Smooth and realistic video playback makes you feel like you are a real drone pilot. 
Large capacity! You can fly to locations that show the beautiful scenery of Korea! 
Two play modes are supported: course-specific flying mode and view mode automatic flight. There is also an achievement system. 
Visit Korea from home at any time! 
Enjoy the drone flight control experience and the beautiful natural scenery. MasCon for Nintendo Switch™ made by Zuiki of Japan is also supported.
70010000104937.name: Korean Drone Flying Tour Hujeong Auditorium

70010000106830.description:
This game requires a good level of understanding of the English language in order to play.
 
Beyond Words
The genre-defining fusion of roguelike strategy and word-crafting. Build powerful combos, unlock upgrades, and master a challenge where victory is spelled one letter at a time.
 
 Build powerful word combos, unlock game-changing upgrades and journey through a living puzzle shaped by your decisions. Every choice, every letter, every placement matters.
 
 It's Time To Spell!
 Play your own way by switching up letter scores, duplicating the ones you love and destroying the ones you don’t. Bend the rules past breaking point with modifiers, stickers, and enhancements where every choice shapes your journey. Think your way through seemingly impossible situations or pick up the pace and go fast and frantic with optional time-attack boards. 
 
 Evolve and Adapt 
 Over 300 unique modifiers and abilities — supercharged tile types, booster cards, power cards, pickups & perks.
 
 Endless combinations bring surprise and opportunity for your creative strategies. It’s all about synergies, combos, and clever play — where every decision can dramatically alter the course of a run. As you progress, your expanding toolbox rewards you with new possibilities every time you play.
 
 Master Challenges
 Each board is a unique puzzle where your words matter. Shifting rules, layouts and objectives keep you adapting in an evolving tactical space. Be a friend to your future self - plan ahead, create routes to powerful pickups and think like a strategist setting up devastating power-scoring combos for that perfect chef’s-kiss word play.
 
 Bosses with Bite
 Overcome 30+ unique Boss challenges that twist the rules in devious ways. When you’re ready to push further, take on time attacks, seeded runs or the brain-melting flipside of negative scoring. Escalating targets and endless play mean there’s always an opportunity to flex your skills in gratifying challenges which demonstrate your level of mastery.
 
 Instantly Playable, Infinitely Replayable
 Easy to pick up thanks to familiar word-tile mechanics while incredibly rewarding to master, welcoming both casual players and hardcore strategists. Whether you’re chasing the highest scores, experimenting with outrageous synergies or simply relaxing into the rhythm of letters and logic - Beyond Words is a playground for endless discovery where every word counts.
70010000106830.intro: Beyond Words is a genre-defining fusion of roguelike strategy and word-crafting.
70010000106830.name: Beyond Words

70010000111323.description:
Brave Rounds is a fast-paced, close range-heavy vertical scrolling shoot 'em up with the beauty and ruthless precision of 00s arcade classics. Shoot them up by yourself or co-op together with a friend!

Master the art of getting closer and beat the heck out of them!

Play as one of three playable characters accompanied with their Options. Shoot the wide shot, focus shot, deploy the bombs, or unleash their special!

You don't have to fight alone; get a friend and play together in Two Player where they control the Options directly! Or control both characters at once with just one controller with Dual Control!

Brave Rounds tells a touching story of inter-generational relationships and the lengths people take to accomplish their goals. Set in the occult and sci-fi-laden modern era of 20XX, Brave Rounds explores the worth in fighting for what you believe in.

Features:
- Arcade Mode, the game's main mode of high-intensity five stages action. Fight the mid-bosses, bosses, and watch out for the dynamic difficulty: Rank! Are you worthy enough to face the True Last Boss...?
- Stage Practice, for your practicing convenience. Whenever you get stuck at Arcade Mode, visit the Stage Practice.
- Story Mode, telling a different story from Arcade Mode, is where you tackle 41 bite-sized stages. Complete the challenges, get the stars, upgrade your strength. Explore the world of Brave Rounds and the motivations behind the characters in lively and animated Visual Novel-style cutscenes!
- Score Attack. Get the high score in the Score Attack-exclusive stage within the 3 minutes time limit! Dare to put the gas on the pedal and raise the rank to its limit?
- Inspired by 00s video games and animes, Brave Rounds features smooth, hi-res hand-drawn art and animations. Colorful and expressive! Watching their movements is key to success.
- Enjoy the soundtrack of various genres by Dicky Teja Pratama, Jasson Prestiliano and Scowsh!
- Screen scaling options including TATE / Vertical mode, rebindable conrols, and replays!
70010000111323.intro: Shoot, punch and get closer through bullets and enemies in this close range-heavy arcade bullet hell shoot 'em up!
70010000111323.name: Brave Rounds

70010000113482.description: Spot Challenge Vol. 1 is a puzzle game inspired by classic visual comparison challenges, where you compare two images and identify the differences between them. With over 360 differences spread across 35 levels, will you be able to find them all? Perfect for playing solo or with friends and family, Spot Challenge is a fun way to test your attention to detail!
70010000113482.intro: Sharpen your eyes and test your focus in the ultimate spot-the-difference challenge!
70010000113482.name: Spot Challenge Vol. 1

70010000117625.description:
SwooshCat – A precision platformer starring an adorable feline! Master simple jumps and dashes to embark on a challenging yet delightful adventure. 

Slash, Parry, Break, Dodge – Your dash isn't just movement: it's a combat blade and puzzle key!

Explore lush jungles and scorching deserts, each meticulously packed with deadly traps and cunning mechanisms to challenge your skills and strategy!

Turn foes into stepping stones – Chain kills, parries, and dashes to bounce off corpses and bullets, resetting mobility to reach "impossible" corners!

Easy to learn, deep to master: Newbies leap right in; speedrunners face brutal challenges!

Buttery controls + Rich level design = An unmissable catventure!
70010000117625.intro: SwooshCat is a vibrant precision-platformer adventure. Leap, dash, slash, stab, roll, and ricochet your way through a charming pixel world as you help a brave little cat explore and battle!
70010000117625.name: SwooshCat

70010000117802.description:
Step into a new chapter of calm and clever challenges in Legends Align Land of Order, a puzzle where every piece has its place and every decision brings you closer to the perfect solution. Set in refreshed environments full of personality, the goal is simple and satisfying: fit different shapes together until the entire board is complete.

With 30 carefully crafted levels, the game invites you to observe, test, and reorganize ideas without rush or pressure. Each layout offers new possibilities, encouraging creative strategies and that clear moment when everything finally aligns.

Easy to understand and pleasant to play, Legends Align Land of Order offers a relaxing experience for players who enjoy visual puzzles, steady progression, and the rewarding feeling of seeing every piece find its place. It is the kind of challenge that calms the mind while keeping your thinking active.
70010000117802.name: Legends Aligned: Land of Order

70010000103012.description:
Seven years after the dramatic events in Anemone Valley, the political situation surrounding magic has reached boiling point within the Empire. At the Seven Winds Academy, however, life goes on undisturbed by outside influences. Here, the students’ biggest worries are exams, job prospects, and who might be taking whom to the New Year’s Gala, but when a curious group of seniors stumble upon a secret hidden within the castle, their priorities for the year change in an instant…

Explore a brand new adventure as a mage student of the Seven Winds Academy and experience a story that can be enjoyed by new and returning players of the series. Choose from three different magical disciplines, and let your choices shape the personality of your character as you navigate school life during a time of great change.

As you uncover the story of Arcadia Fallen II, you will decide how you respond to the people around you and the events that unfold. Tone labels help you avoid unexpected consequences, and choices with significant impact on the story are highlighted. But no matter what you decide to do, there are no “wrong” choices and no dead ends. Only you can find the path that is right for you.

Your chosen magical discipline will affect your character's upbringing, what locations they are familiar with, and what skills they bring to the team. This and more will influence puzzles throughout the game and challenge you in different ways depending on the choices you make in each playthrough.

No true boarding school experience is complete without a bit of rule-breaking! Sneak out at night with your friends and discover the secrets the old castle holds. If you’re daring, you might pick up some juicy gossip as well.
70010000103012.intro: Choose from three different magical disciplines, and let your choices shape the personality of your character as you navigate school life during a time of great change
70010000103012.name: Arcadia Fallen II

70010000118771.description:
Climb the branches of knowledge in Nature’s Question, an engaging quiz that turns curiosity about the natural world into a journey of growth and challenge. Guided by Sylvaran, the forest’s guardian spirit, you must answer questions to restore the strength of the Ancient Tree and reach the top of its majestic living tower.

Each correct answer strengthens the tree and lets you advance through its floors, while mistakes end the journey and invite you to try again. As you climb higher, questions become more challenging and time becomes more precious, demanding focus, quick thinking, and strategic decisions.

Use your points to activate powerful aids at the right moment, overcoming obstacles and keeping your ascent alive. With shuffled questions in every run and dynamic progression, each playthrough offers a new opportunity to prove your knowledge.

Relax in nature-inspired environments, challenge your mind, and discover how far your knowledge can take you. In Nature’s Question, every answer brings you one step closer to the top of the Ancient Tree.
70010000118771.intro: Climb the Ancient Tree and test your knowledge of nature
70010000118771.name: Nature's Question

70010000121405.description:
Take on one long, continuous obby set in a Japanese samurai world, filled with deadly platforms, precise jumps, and skill-based obstacles. Littered with checkpoints to keep you progressing — pure parkour as you make your way along the warrior’s path.

Features:

One long samurai-themed obby
Skill-based parkour gameplay
Tricky jumps and challenging obstacles
Japanese-inspired environments and visuals
Checkpoints throughout the course
Designed for players who enjoy classic obbies
70010000121405.intro: Do you have the discipline to conquer the Samurai Trial?
70010000121405.name: Samurai Obby

70070000033540.description:
Two wars. Two battlefields. One test of survival and skill.

This two intense shooter experiences that throw you into unforgiving combat scenarios where every decision matters. Face relentless zombie hordes in a collapsing city and step onto the front lines of World War II, where courage, precision, and tactics decide victory. Whether you’re fighting for survival or honor, this bundle delivers nonstop action across two distinct combat worlds.

DeadZone: Survival Ops Zombie Shooter

The city has fallen. The undead rule. Survival is your only mission.
In DeadZone: Survival Ops Zombie Shooter, you fight through a post-apocalyptic city overrun by zombies. Fast-paced firefights, constant pressure, and limited resources force you to stay alert at all times. Defeat enemies to earn Survival Points, unlock powerful upgrades, and customize your weapons to match your playstyle.

Move between dangerous zones using helicopters, explore abandoned areas filled with hidden threats, and rely on tactical tools like grenades and traps to survive increasingly difficult encounters. Every wave pushes your reflexes and decision-making to the limit.

Key Highlights:

- Intense arcade-style FPS zombie combat
- Weapon and ability upgrades through progression
- Tactical gadgets and customizable equipment
- Survival-focused gameplay in hostile environments

WW2 Soldiers of Honor – Warzone Assault

Honor is forged in the heat of battle.
Step into the chaos of World War II and take on high-risk missions behind enemy lines. As a skilled soldier, you’ll sabotage enemy positions, clear fortified locations, and fight across war-torn environments inspired by historic conflicts.

Each mission challenges your tactical approach, requiring careful weapon choice, positioning, and awareness. Hidden objectives and relics reward exploration, while escalating battles keep the pressure high from start to finish.

Key Highlights:

- Story-driven WWII combat missions
- Historically inspired weapons and gear
- Tactical objectives and strategic gameplay
- Varied war zones with dynamic encounters


From surviving an undead apocalypse to fighting for victory on the battlefield, this bundle offers action, intensity, and replayability across two unique shooters. Master both worlds, adapt to different combat styles, and prove you have what it takes to survive any war.
70070000033540.intro: Survival Has Many Faces. Face Them All.
70070000033540.name: DeadZone: Survival Ops Zombie Shooter & WW2 Soldiers of Honor - Warzone Assault

70010000119456.description:
Kamikaze Strike: FPV Drone pushes the boundaries of modern combat simulation, putting your piloting skills to the ultimate test in high-stakes, first-person kamikaze missions. This isn't just a game; it’s a high-octane descent into the future of electronic warfare, where your precision determines the outcome of the frontline.

Experience ultra-smooth, responsive drone controls engineered to mimic professional racing rigs. From the immersive FPV cockpit, you’ll navigate hostile, high-threat environments where every second counts. You aren't just flying—you are the weapon.
Master the Art of the Strike

Become a ghost in the machine as you weave through "dead zones." To reach your objective, you must:

    -Dodge Enemy Fire: Evade rapid-fire anti-air guns and small arms fire.

    -Neutralize Electronic Warfare: Navigate around signal jammers and radar arrays that threaten to kill your feed.

    -Precision Impact: Deliver devastating payloads by crashing directly into high-value military assets, including heavy tanks, mobile artillery units, and fortified enemy command centers.

Realistic Military Training & Progression

Before heading into the heat of battle, hone your craft in the Dedicated Training Grounds. This expansive training map is designed for pilots to master:

    -High-Speed Technical Flight: Push your motors to the limit through gate races and tight gaps.

    -Acrobatic Maneuvers: Practice power loops, dives, and sharp snaps to become unpredictable to enemy sensors.

    -Tactical Drills: Simulate approach runs on static targets to perfect your terminal velocity and impact angles.

The True Pilot Experience

With cutting-edge flight physics and a simulated analog/digital video feed, you will feel the weight, inertia, and adrenaline of a real-world drone operator. Every vibration and signal flicker pulls you deeper into the role of a modern elite pilot.

Kamikaze Strike delivers an authentic, gritty, and explosive blend of pilot skill and military strategy. The sky is no longer a limit—it’s your playground of destruction.
70010000119456.intro: Fly a kamikaze drone through fast-paced FPV missions. Dodge bullets, sneak past jammers and radars, and crash into tanks, troops, and enemy bases.
70010000119456.name: Kamikaze Strike:FPV Drone

70010000121468.description:
Wander through marble streets, towering amphitheaters, and bustling forums as you explore a sunlit city of stone and history. Every district hides landmarks waiting to be found!

Empire Hike is all about exploration, atmosphere, and discovery — rewarding curiosity and careful observation.

Features:
>Vast Rome-inspired imperial city
>Iconic landmarks and hidden locations to find
>Calm, immersive walking simulator gameplay
>Scenic viewpoints and secret spots
70010000121468.name: Empire Hike

70010000098841.description:
Outerloop Games delivers Dosa Divas - a spicy narrative turn-based RPG. After years apart, sisters Samara and Amani journey with their ancient spirit-mech on a mission to defeat a rotten fast food empire and reconnect communities with their traditions. Platform through vibrant villages, battle corporate goons, reconcile with loved ones, and eat one last meal together before saying goodbye.

TASTE VICTORY
Engage in a flavorful turn-based combat system where every attack packs some heat, especially when you time it right. Hitting the action button as the hit lands amplifies your attack damage and strengthens your blocks against enemy attacks.  Use boost points at the start of your turn to multiply damage on attacks and skills. Each character harnesses their Spirit Power to use a unique set of class-based abilities associated with one of five flavor profiles. Match enemy flavour cravings to break down their defenses and leave them stuffed. With each round, build up your Ultimate meter to use special group Ultimates and serve up some devastating damage. 

MECH-SPLORATION
Traverse unique villages in a customizable and upgradable ancient spirit-mech named Goddess. Double-jump, drill, and grapple your way through the world to discover local ingredients, hidden paths, memories, and new friends.

ORDER UP
Cook up made-to-order food to wake the people from a processed food-induced haze using the expressive cooking system. Forage, fish, and barter to collect ingredients and fire up orders for hungry villagers. Delivering delicious, hearty meals reconnects communities with their culture, history, and shared memories and increases your reputation. Developing a strong reputation comes with major perks and progression.

FIST FOOD
Fuel yourself in battle by having a quick bite to eat. Leverage the effects of ingredients to adjust recipes and create extra fragrant dishes that restore health, enhance damage, fortify defense, and replenish your Spirit Power.

MECH IT YOUR OWN
Serve up looks by customizing your spirit-mech, Goddess. Mix and match your mech’s body, arms, and legs. Create your own spicy style with custom wraps and accessories.
70010000098841.intro: Two sisters and a mech cook, bond, and fight corpos in a spicy turn-based RPG.
70010000098841.name: Dosa Divas

70010000104639.description:
Explore the haunting, dreamlike fantasy world of BEFORE I GO, a punishing Metroidvania where you embody the innocence of an inner child on an allegorical odyssey towards death acceptance. The end is inevitable, but will you brave the journey?

The world is old and unwell. An ominous affliction has left every living soul weak, terrified and helpless before despair.
But this paralyzing infestation has left the innocence of a young child untainted.
Lost in limbo, an otherworldly journey awaits you. Find answers. Face your greatest fear. Confront reality.

BEFORE I GO depicts a contemplative reflection on existence and the transitory nature of life.
Lose yourself in this enigmatic tale. In adversity, find your way to deliverance and peace.

BEFORE I GO is a challenging side-scrolling action-platformer that distils the classic genre down to its most beloved aspects,
satisfying old-school platformer lovers and enthusiasts looking for fresh mechanics.

Key Features
 - Unconventional storytelling grounded in a genuine emotional tragedy.
 - Unique art style with a foreboding and melancholic atmosphere.
